zh.lifeSummary: 當Rachel Hughson於1758年4月2日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼卡梅爾時，她的父親George Thomas Hughson40歲，母親Susannah Shewis41歲。她於1775年6月19日與Elisha E Smith在美國紐約州維斯斯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1848年10月18日在美國紐約州格林可薩吉可薩吉享年90歲，埋葬在美國紐約州格林凱洛斯米-布特勒 派利 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rachel Hughson于1758年4月2日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼卡梅爾时，她的父亲George Thomas Hughson40岁，母亲Susannah Shewis41岁。她于1775年6月19日与Elisha E Smith在美国纽约州維斯斯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1848年10月18日在美国纽约州格林可薩吉可薩吉享年90岁，埋葬在美国纽约州格林凱洛斯米-布特勒 派利 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hughson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Huson
meanings: English: patronymic from the personal name Hugh, Hue (see Hugh ) + -son.

nameMeanings.name: Rachel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘ewe’ in Hebrew), borne by the beloved wife of Jacob and mother (after long barrenness) of Joseph (Genesis 28–35) and of Benjamin, at whose birth she died. In the Middle Ages and subsequently this was regarded as a characteristically Jewish name, but it is now also popular among Gentiles.

variants.name: Rachelle
meanings: Elaborated form of   Rachel  , as if from French, but actually a recent coinage in English.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.
Oldest grave seen in the memorials list.

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.

historicEvents.title: The Oregon Trail
historicEvents.description: Many people started their 2,170-mile West trek to settle the land found by Louis and Clark. They used large-wheeled wagons to pack most of their belongings and were guided by trails that were made by the previous trappers and traders who walked the area. Over time the trail needed annual improvements to make the trip faster and safer. Most of Interstate 80 and 84 cover most of the ground that was the original trail.

en.lifeSummary: When Rachel Hughson was born on 2 April 1758, in Carmel, New York Colony, British Colonial America, her father, George Thomas Hughson, was 40 and her mother, Susannah Shewis, was 41. She married Elisha E Smith on 19 June 1775, in Westchester, New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 18 October 1848, in Coxsackie, Coxsackie, Greene, New York, United States, at the age of 90, and was buried in Smith-Butler Family Cemetery, Cairo, Greene, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rachel Hughson est née le 2 avril 1758, à Carmel, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, George Thomas Hughson, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Susannah Shewis, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Elisha E Smith le 19 juin 1775, à Westchester, New York, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 octobre 1848, à Coxsackie, Coxsackie, Greene, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Smith-Butler Family Cemetery, Cairo, Greene, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rachel Hughson am 2. April 1758 in Carmel, New York Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Thomas Hughson 40 und ihre Mutter Susannah Shewis 41. Sie hat am 19. Juni 1775 in Westchester, New York, Vereinigte Staaten Elisha E Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Oktober 1848 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Coxsackie, Coxsackie, Greene, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Smith-Butler Family Cemetery, Cairo, Greene, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Hughson è nata il il 2 aprile 1758 nel Carmel, New York Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, George Thomas Hughson, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Susannah Shewis, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Elisha E Smith il 19 giugno 1775, nel Westchester, New York, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1848, nel Coxsackie, Coxsackie, Greene, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Smith-Butler Family Cemetery, Cairo, Greene, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rachel Hughsonが1758年4月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーカーメルで生まれた時，父George Thomas Hughsonは40歳，母Susannah Shewisは41歳であった。1775年6月19日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ウエストチェスターでElisha E Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1848年10月18日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州グレエンコクスサクイコクスサクイで90歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州グレエンケイロスミス-ブトラー ファミリー セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rachel Hughson(이)가 1758년 4월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 카멀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Thomas Hughson(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susannah Shewis(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1775년 6월 19일 미국 뉴욕 주 웨스트체스터에서 Elisha E Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1848년 10월 18일 미국 뉴욕 주 그린 콕스사키 콕스사키에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 그린 케어오 스미스-버틀러 파밀리 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rachel Hughson nasceu em 2 de abril de 1758, em Carmel, New York Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, George Thomas Hughson, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Susannah Shewis, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Elisha E Smith em 19 de junho de 1775, em Westchester, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1848, em Coxsackie, Coxsackie, Greene, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Smith-Butler Family Cemetery, Cairo, Greene, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rachel Hughson родилась 2 апреля 1758 г. в местности кармел, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени George Thomas Hughson было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Susannah Shewis, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Elisha E Smith 19 июня 1775 г. в местности весчестир, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 18 октября 1848 г. в местности кокссакки, кокссакки, грин, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности смит-батлир фамили кеметири, цеиро, грин, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rachel Hughson nació el 2 de abril de 1758, en Carmel, New York Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, George Thomas Hughson, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Susannah Shewis, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Elisha E Smith el 19 de junio de 1775, en Westchester, Nueva York, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1848, en Coxsackie, Coxsackie, Greene, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultada en Smith-Butler Family Cemetery, Cairo, Greene, Nueva York, Estados Unidos.
